# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 3, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The development focus for April 3, 2026, centered on expanding the plugin ecosystem through the submission of two new integration pull requests, focusing on swap functionality and specific protocol support.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work, bug fixes, refactoring, documentation enhancements, or tests were reported for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#331](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/331): Add @madeonsol/plugin-madeonsol
*   [#330](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/330): Add @elizaos/plugin-swapapi

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None*

## NEW ISSUES
*None*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None*
